text.title: Contextual Inquiry Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: recruit-and-consent
step.action: Recruit participants; obtain signed consent before session.
step.decision-gate: Do not proceed without signed consent.

step.name: field-session
step.action: Run 60-180 min session; master-apprentice frame; record verbatim quotes + breakdowns + photos (if consented).

step.name: interpretation-session
step.action: Two researchers discuss; surface candidate themes; tag quotes to themes.

step.name: affinity-diagram
step.action: Cluster verbatim quotes into themes; reject themes with <3 supporting quotes.

step.name: emit-report
step.action: Render report; deliver to product + design teams.
